questions.question: What government depository in Kentucky has doors weighing 20 tons each?

What nation's soldiers did one Englishman sum up in World War II as 'overpaid, oversexed— and over here'?
What virus killed two million people in 1967?

What magazine was the first to sell a billion copies worldwide in a year, in 1974?
